failure_modes.cause: Thermal degradation or salt precipitation of TBAB/EG at 120°C over extended residence time
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement a high-pressure flush cycle with pure EG between runs

failure_modes.cause: Exothermic nature of 1,3-Dipolar Cycloaddition exceeding heat removal capacity of 0.75mm tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Integrate inline thermocouples at 5m intervals to monitor axial temperature profile

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of DES (TBAB/EG) at pump head causing excessive mechanical stress
failure_modes.mitigation: Use chemically resistant diaphragm pumps with reinforced PTFE seals

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage leads to immediate system overpressure
Pump head — failure results in total loss of flow and potential stagnant overheating
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run: Operate at 120°C for 5x tau (10 min) continuously for 24h; monitor dP for increase > 10%
Calorimetric mapping: Run reaction at 1.5x concentration (0.75 M) and measure delta-T between inlet and outlet
Viscosity-Pressure correlation: Measure dP across the 19m coil at T=25°C vs T=120°C to validate pump load
